project.name: SpektoWatch2
project.description: Native iOS and watchOS acoustic measurement application with real-time spectrograms, loudness metrics, recording/export workflows, widgets, and watch connectivity.

layers.name: iOS App
layers.description: The main iOS SwiftUI application, audio pipeline, recording workflow, exports, masking features, and dashboard UI.

layers.name: Watch App
layers.description: The watchOS companion app, watch audio engine, wearable views, and watch-specific widget surfaces.

layers.name: Shared Core
layers.description: Shared models, app group keys, watch connectivity protocol support, loudness calculations, and cross-target utilities.

layers.name: Complications
layers.description: WidgetKit complication providers, entries, views, and watch complication configuration.

layers.name: Tests
layers.description: Unit, UI, snapshot, watch, and integration tests that define expected behavior across the app.

layers.name: Project Config
layers.description: Xcode project files, test plans, schemes, CI scripts, export artifacts, and other project wiring.

layers.name: Docs
layers.description: Top-level documentation, project plans, references, and technical summaries.

layers.name: Design Handoff
layers.description: Design references, rendered plates, handoff prototypes, and supporting assets.

layers.name: Agent Planning
layers.description: Agent milestones, task plans, reports, scripts, patterns, and project tracking material.

tour.title: Start With the App Entrypoints
tour.description: Read the iOS and watchOS app roots to see how services are created and injected before following individual screens.

tour.title: Understand Live Audio and DSP Flow
tour.description: Trace microphone/audio state through capture, FFT, weighting, metrics, aggregation, spectrogram rendering, and shared loudness logic.

tour.title: Map the Dashboard and Widgets
tour.description: Follow the iOS dashboard shell, preset composition, widget cards, chart renderers, spectrogram, waterfall, LAF graph, single-value, and tone-generator surfaces.

tour.title: Inspect Recording, Persistence, and Export
tour.description: Review how recordings are coordinated, stored, read back, displayed, and exported as CSV, images, and PDF reports.

tour.title: Follow Watch Connectivity and Wearable UI
tour.description: Trace shared protocol messages and binary spectrogram packets into the iOS/watch managers and the watch dashboard widgets.

tour.title: Review Complications
tour.description: Read the WidgetKit bundle, provider, entry, and views to understand how watch complication data is surfaced.

tour.title: Check Masking and Bandstop Features
tour.description: Inspect the masking profile, trigger acquisition, novelty detection, preview, suggestion, and bandstop filter management feature slices.

tour.title: Use Tests as Behavior Maps
tour.description: Skim test plans and representative tests to learn expected behavior for watch protocols, audio, loudness, integration, UI, screenshots, and snapshots.

tour.title: Review Build and Project Wiring
tour.description: Use the Xcode project, schemes, Package.resolved, CI script, test plans, and export folder to understand targets and automation.

tour.title: Cross-Check Docs, Design, and Agent Plans
tour.description: Correlate implementation with architecture notes, performance contracts, redesign handoff, visual references, and ACP milestone planning.
